name: Lemon Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the pie plate with pastry and bake at 475°F for 8 minutes. Let cool.
2. In a saucepan, mix cornstarch, sugar, and salt. Add water and stir until everything is completely dissolved. Cook over medium-low heat until the mixture thickens. Add lemon zest. Cook stirring for 2-3 minutes.
3. Blend a little of the hot mixture into the beaten egg yolks. Slowly add the yolks to the pan, whisking constantly, then cook stirring for 2-3 minutes over low heat.
4. Remove pan from heat and mix in lemon juice and butter. Pour into baked pie shell.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (or 325°F for a glass pie pan). Beat egg whites until frothy in a metal bowl. Add cream of tartar and salt, then continue beating. Add sugar about a tablespoon at a time. Add vanilla and beat at high speed until whites are glossy and peaks hold up.
6. Spoon meringue around the edges of the warm pie filling first, then spoon remainder into center. Using a spoon or spatula, spread meringue evenly. Dip lightly across the top to make tiny peaks.
7. Bake in center rack of oven for 12-15 minutes until peaks are lightly browned. Cool to room temperature. Cool at least 2 hours before serving.
